title: 📌 Instructions: Choose one of the prompts below to explore in depth.
content:
📌 Instructions: Choose one of the prompts below to explore in depth.

🔹 Concrete Prompt:

Reflect on a time when you received constructive criticism. How did it impact your work or thinking?

🔹 Abstract Prompt:

Why is it difficult for writers to edit their own work objectively?

🔹 Connecting Prompt:

Consider a time when you misunderstood feedback—what caused the miscommunication? How can writers ensure they apply critique effectively?

🔹 Exploratory Prompt:

If you could rewrite an argument you lost, how would you change your approach to win this time?


Day 11: Precision in Language & Word Choice
📌 Instructions: Choose one of the prompts below to explore in depth.

🔹 Concrete Prompt:

Find a paragraph in your writing and rewrite it using fewer words while maintaining meaning and impact.

🔹 Abstract Prompt:

How does word choice shape tone and clarity in writing?
context: From document: Daily Journal Prompts | Weeks 1 - 6 | ENG 101 — chunk 8 (chunk 8/19)
